mapper.select: select id, user_id, check_in_time, check_in_type, check_in_status, check_in_location, create_time, update_time from punch_record where id = #{id}
select id, user_id, check_in_time, check_in_type, check_in_status, check_in_location, create_time, update_time from punch_record
select id, user_id, check_in_time, check_in_type, check_in_status, check_in_location, create_time, update_time from punch_record where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: insert into punch_record (user_id, check_in_time, check_in_type, check_in_status, check_in_location, create_time, update_time) values (#{userId}, #{checkInTime}, #{checkInType}, #{checkInStatus}, #{checkInLocation}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: select id, user_id, check_in_time, check_in_type, check_in_status, check_in_location, create_time, update_time from punch_record order by create_time desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
select count(*) from punch_record where user_id = #{userId}
